name: compliance source contract operator-facing validator accepts an entry with all section 2.19 required fields
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:
  - id: nist-csf-2
    name: NIST CSF 2.0
    url: https://example.com
    authoritative_publisher: NIST
    jurisdiction: US Federal
    applicable_to: [federal]
    identifier_scheme: GV/ID/PR/DE/RS/RC
    why_authoritative: |
      Line one of why this is authoritative source.
      Line two giving more context for the authority.
      Line three completing the at-least-three-line requirement.
    fetch_frequency: weekly
    legal_review_required: false
    paywalled: false
    document_url: https://example.com
    attribution_note: NIST public domain
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml --tier operator 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'sources_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
